chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D-2729 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No.12121/2022 2. For hearing of main case 25.05.2022 Syed Masood Anwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali, Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.4, which is taken on record. Since user I.D of the petitioner has been blocked without providing opportunity of hearing, which is found to be illegal and uncalled for. Customs Authorities are directed to reopen the same in accordance with law. However, if any illegality is found against the petitioner in future, the Department is at liberty to act in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE SM
